strengths: 14+ years full-stack development with strong TypeScript and Node.js expertise; currently building AI agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq
Multiple staff-level roles demonstrating architecture and leadership; built GISCollective platform and established CI/CD infrastructure at Altom Consulting
Deep testing and craftsmanship focus throughout career, including organizing Code Kata sessions and creating testing libraries like Fluent-Asserts
concerns: No explicit Nest.js framework experience despite it being a primary technology; background shows Node.js/Express/GraphQL patterns
Specific testing framework expertise (Jest/Vitest) not mentioned in skills or employment history despite career emphasis on TDD

Employment timeline contains multiple overlapping dates (RIDE Capital Sept 2020–Dec 2021 overlaps with Optilyz Dec 2021 start; Dunnhumby 2018–2020 overlaps with RIDE; others) raising accuracy questions

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP infrastructure experience

response.justification: Strong candidate with seniority well above the 6+ year requirement. Current role at re:cinq directly involves TypeScript/Node.js and AI agent infrastructure, aligning with core needs. Demonstrates consistent testing discipline and platform ownership. Primary gaps are framework-specific (Nest.js, Jest/Vitest) rather than architectural—areas a capable engineer could quickly master. Timeline inconsistencies and missing documentation on secondary requirements (explicit Postgres/Kubernetes depth) warrant clarification but don't disqualify based on proven ability to master diverse technology stacks.
